nodes.name: Call AI API
nodes.notes:
ANTHROPIC (active):
  POST https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages
  x-api-key: $env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
  model: claude-sonnet-4-20250514

OPENAI alternative:
  POST https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions
  Authorization: Bearer $env.OPENAI_API_KEY
  model: gpt-4o-mini
  Change jsonBody to use {role:'system'} + {role:'user'} messages array.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 1024, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.system_prompt + '\n\n' + $json.user_prompt }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ github_pr_number: $json.pr_number, github_repo: $json.repo_full_name, pr_title: $json.pr_title, pr_author: $json.pr_author, risk_level: $json.risk_level, risk_summary: $json.risk_summary, files_changed: $json.changed_files, lines_added: $json.additions, lines_removed: $json.deletions, ai_model_used: $json.ai_model_used, raw_ai_response: $json.raw_ai_response }) }}
